title: International Management MSc 2025 Programme Overview and Learning Outcomes
text: International Management MSc 2025 Program Overview Award: MSc Duration: 1 year Course Type: Full Time Start Date: 08 September 2025 Choosing this programme for 2025 Our MSc International Management degree programme will give you insight into becoming a successful global business manager. It will enhance your knowledge of how businesses operate and are managed. It also encourages you to explore different topics to help you discover what you want to specialise in. It’s open to graduates from different academic and professional backgrounds. Our one year postgraduate Master’s programmes are taught in English, and content is equivalent to programmes delivered to other University of Southampton students. The globally respected nature of UK awarded degrees means that the one year UK Master’s is equivalent to a two year Master’s degree awarded from a non-UK source. What you will study In your management studies, you’ll explore the traits of effective managers by studying essential concepts. You’ll put your learning into practice with practical exercises and simulations. You’ll also learn: how organisations operate and are managed how to resolve issues through your understanding of management concepts analytical, communication and self-management skills
summary: The MSc International Management program at the University of Southampton Delhi is a one-year full-time master's degree starting September 2025, designed for graduates to become global business managers. Students will gain essential management knowledge and practical skills for global business operations.

title: MSc International Management Core and Optional Modules 2025
text: Course modules Students take a number of core and compulsory modules before selecting optional modules based on their interest. The programmes are designed to ensure that students gain the fundamentals of their discipline and then add specialisation and perspective through available optional modules. Optional modules may include modules related to the core discipline as well as options built around contemporary, real-world trends that change from time to time. Find out why, when and how we might make changes. Students will take 8 fixed course modules, and 1 optional elective. Students must take all these course modules:- Accounting and Control MANG6079 Career Management in a Digital Age MANG6566 Dissertation (DSIE) MANG6550 International Marketing MANG6523 Managing within a Global Context MANG6273 Risk Taking and Decision Making MANG6134 Strategic Management MANG6530 Strategic Operations Management MANG6525 Students must choose one of these optional electives:- International Corporate Social Responsibility and Ethics MANG6535 Managing Global Challenges MANG6396
summary: The MSc International Management curriculum includes 8 fixed core modules covering essential management principles, complemented by one optional elective from areas like International Corporate Social Responsibility or Managing Global Challenges. Modules are designed for fundamental knowledge and specialization.
entities: Career Management in a Digital Age
International Corporate Social Responsibility and Ethics

title: International Management MSc Career Opportunities and Employability Support
text: Your future career We are a top 20 UK university for employability (QS Graduate Employability Rankings 2022). By the end of this master in International Management, you’ll have essential skills for various careers in organisations across the world. Career opportunities Examples of roles that previous graduates have held in international business management include: credit officer human resources officer auditor project manager Companies you could work at University of Southampton International Management graduates have worked for: Siemens IBM London John Lewis and Partners L’Oreal KPMG PwC Coca-Cola Shinhan Bank Careers services at University of Southampton Delhi As well as support from our team in Delhi, you’ll have access to our market-leading employability development offering. This includes: online resources regular workshops one-to-one guidance and support with qualified careers professionals through our MyCareer platform Through our e-mentoring scheme, you’ll also have access to: tailored career planning advice on employability skills industry insight We have incorporated our employability skills model, Successful Futures, into our curriculum. Our links with multi-national and industrial organisations mean you can expect to engage with employers and explore potential career paths. You’ll receive a personalised employability programme that will provide excellent prospects for securing a premium placement and financial security on graduating. We also host regular alumni events hosted in person across major cities in India, allowing you to grow your own networks. Our support is ongoing, and once you graduate, you’ll be part of a global community of over 220,000 alumni that spans over 180 countries.
summary: The MSc International Management programme at the University of Southampton prepares graduates for global careers, with strong employability rankings and dedicated career services in Delhi. Support includes workshops, mentoring, employer engagement, and access to a vast alumni network.

title: MSc International Management Key Information and Entry Requirements
text: Key information To help plan your year we have published University of Southampton Delhi term and holiday dates in advance, but these may be subject to change. We expect to provide 20 seats on this programme for academic year 25/26. Eligibility criteria Upper second-class degree or international equivalent. We do not accept the following degrees: Business English Applied English vocational degrees English language requirement We accept several ways of meeting our English language requirement. These include: IELTS Test, with scores of 6.5 overall (6.0 in reading, writing, speaking, and listening) other tests listed on our website an approved academic qualification having the required grade. If you’ve successfully completed a degree, taught and assessed in English, up to 2 years before the date of first enrolment at the University of Southampton, we may be able to accept this as evidence of your English language ability. Refer to our English language proficiency guide for more information about English language requirements
summary: The MSc International Management programme for academic year 25/26 has 20 seats, requiring an upper second-class degree or international equivalent. Applicants must also meet English language proficiency through IELTS (6.5 overall) or other approved qualifications.

title: International Management MSc 2025 Tuition Fees, Payment, Scholarships and Loans
text: Our fees You can pay your tuition fee in up to 4 instalments. The fees for a year’s study, starting in August 2025, are: 15,40,000 INR for India students 17,60,000 INR for Overseas students Your first payment will be a deposit of 10% of the programme fee. To confirm your offer, you must pay your deposit within 28 days of receiving a conditional offer, and no later than 14 days before the start of term. For students starting in August 2025, the deposit is: 154,000 INR for India students 176,000 INR for Overseas students You’ll then pay the balance of your yearly tuition fee as you study, in up to 3 instalments. If you’re an India student, you’ll have to make 3 separate payments of: 369,600 INR by Monday 8 September 2025 508,200 INR by Monday 26 January 2026 508,200 INR by Monday 20 April 2026 If you’re an Overseas student, you’ll have to make 3 separate payments of: 422,400 INR by Monday 8 September 2025 580,800 INR by Monday 26 January 2026 580,800 INR by Monday 20 April 2026 We may adjust the fees in the future to account for inflation and changes in other costs. Exact payment dates for future years will vary according to the academic calendar. Funding Scholarships We offer competitive scholarships to academically gifted students. Funding support Please email us about the partnerships we have developed with trusted and reputable financial institutions keen to support University of Southampton Delhi students with a range of education loans.
summary: The 2025 MSc International Management program's tuition fees are 15,40,000 INR for India students and 17,60,000 INR for Overseas students, payable in instalments after a 10% deposit. Competitive scholarships and education loan partnerships are available to support students.

title: MSc International Management Application Process and Frequently Asked Questions
text: Our application process Admissions are now open for a place at our campus in the Delhi NCR. Our first cohort for postgraduate master’s degrees starts in August 2025. Potential students can understand more about our application process by looking at helpful guidance and advice on university admissions pages. Download more details This downloadable document contains an overview of the programme, its aims, the programme structure, information on course modules and shows how we assess student progress as they learn with us. PDF MSc International Management 2025 Programme Description Document 84 KB How to apply Our programmes are taught in English, and content is equivalent to that delivered to other University of Southampton students. To match the programme lengths of internationally respected UK awarded degrees, undergraduates study for three years, and postgraduates study for one year. How much does an application to study cost? There is normally a 2,000 INR application assessment fee which students would need to pay in order for us to process their application for those starting in August 2026. Can I apply for a scholarship or bursary? We welcome applications for a scholarship or bursary from any self-funding student who will be paying domestic Tuition Fees. Additional criteria, such as programme eligibility, are shown clearly on individual award pages. You must first make an application to study a specific programme before you make an application for a scholarship or bursary. When will the next academic year start? You can see the most up to date information about start dates on our page showing key information. Should I wait to make my application to study? We encourage students to make their application to study at University of Southampton Delhi as soon as they can. This means we can issue an early Conditional Offer and that students will have the best the chance to meet their offer conditions. If demand is high, we may choose to close applications earlier than mentioned, but students with Offers to study would receive preferential treatment. Can I get an offer with predicted scores? We encourage students to apply as soon as possible so that they can receive a Conditional Offer based on predicted scores for their chosen programme. We can accept an application from a student using their predicted grades if we receive their final grades once they are available.
summary: Admissions for the MSc International Management program starting August 2025 in Delhi NCR are open, with an application fee of 2,000 INR for 2026 starters. Applicants are encouraged to apply early for conditional offers, even with predicted scores, and can apply for scholarships after programme application.
entities: MSc International Management 2025 Programme Description Document
